tasks.description: Replace deprecated datetime.utcnow() with datetime.now(datetime.UTC) in 5 core files
tasks.impact: Eliminates Python 3.13 DeprecationWarning spam (40+ per log cycle)

tasks.description: Install and configure pytest-playwright for E2E dashboard tests
tasks.impact: Resolves 'fixture page not found' error in test_dashboard_playwright.py

tasks.description: Improve LLM routing resilience: add openai fallback route + groq key revocation detection
changes: Added _route_openai() fallback using OPENAI_API_KEY env var
Added _GROQ_KEY_REVOKED flag to skip restricted groq keys
llm_error_disables_route() now marks groq as revoked on org_restricted
Graceful fallback chain: groq(revoked) → openrouter → gemini → openai
